tasks.all: cmd /c start cmd /k "title Server 1 & cd dns-server && deno run -N --unstable-net server-prod.ts" & cmd /c start cmd /k "title Client 1 & cd dns-client && deno run -N --unstable-net client-prod.ts" & cmd /c start cmd /k "title Client 2 & cd dns-client-web && deno run --allow-net --unstable-net --allow-read=index.html --allow-run=explorer,open webapp-prod.ts"
